teamObjective.explanation: Deterministically repaired ToM trace with objective protect_partner.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 2) has 3 cards and no public actions yet. With no signal from partner, I assume they hold an average near-finish hand; I should lead low so they can potentially take control if they have a higher non-trump card or any trump.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponent player 1 has only 2 cards and is near finish, so their team has a strong incentive to win this trick or finish soon. Player 3 also has 3 cards. They likely saved strong cards (trump-rank 7s, jokers, or high trumps) to counter low leads. Without seeing any played cards, I must treat hidden cards probabilistically and avoid over-committing my modest strength.
